prompt: Generate typography for word 'WINNER' using clean branding font from the first image, player imagery from the second, and a gradient background from the third image.
prompt_refined: Generate a dynamic textual graphic for the word 'WINNER'. Render 'WINNER' in a prominent, bold, clean, white sans-serif typography, emulating the branding style seen in image 1. Integrate the full-body imagery of Lionel Messi from image 2 into the composition, complementing the text. The background should adopt the distinctive swirling, impasto gradient style and dark blue and yellow color palette of 'The Starry Night' from image 3.
objects: Prominent, bold, clean, white sans-serif typography for 'WINNER' (emulating Canon branding style)
